arts.ttl: ‘Won’t let him go’ – Chelsea scouts to watch player in every single match
arts.sum: Geovany Quenda might already be a Chelsea player but the Premier League club will continue to watch the winger during the remaining time he’s with Sporting CP. Despite extensive links to Manchester United, it was announced that the 17-year-old would be joining the Blues in 2026. arts.ttl: Brentford vs Chelsea Premier League clash predicted as the Blues' top-four chase continues
arts.sum: Chelsea have failed to beat Brentford on their last two trips to the Gtech Community Stadium, though the Blues emerged victorious in the clash between the two sides earlier this season, with Marc Cucurella and Nicolas Jackson both scoring in a 2-1 win at Stamford Bridge. Enzo Fernandez scored the only goal of the game as Chelsea beat Tottenham 1-0 at Stamford Bridge earlier this week, ensuring that Enzo Maresca's side sat inside the Premier League top four spots.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: The truth on Enzo Fernandez to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has had his say on Real Madrid's attempts to sign Enzo Fernandez this summer. There have been multiple reports over the last week that Madrid are preparing a big money offer for the Chelsea midfielder this summer.
